$comment: Valid: reasoning_reconstruction omitted (legal below the declared variety band floor, L1-TB-06). Acknowledgment value 'concern' carries the required concern text.
understanding: Write the replay runbook for refunds, covering operator preconditions and the read-only replay path.
most_likely_wrong: Which operator role owns replay approval.
least_confident_item: That replay never re-posts ledger entries under any flag combination.
first_action: Enumerate the replay tool's flags and classify each as read-only or write-capable.

variety_acknowledgment.concern: The scope rationale reads as single-document work, but the runbook spans two operator audiences; scope may be understated by one point.
